content.sentence_text: The 'ch'arger supplies the correct output consistently during load testing.
The 'ch'oke reduces electrical noise in the circuit effectively.
The system is swit'ch'ing smoothly, with no delay or arcing observed.
The control 'ch'ip processes signals accurately under normal operating conditions.

example.text:

ආදර්ශ සංවාදවලට සවන් දෙන්න.
மாதிரி உரையாடல்களை கேளுங்கள்.

පින්තූර සමඟ වචන ගලපන්න.
சொற்களைப் படங்களுடன் பொருத்துங்கள்.

activity_2_e.text:
Listen and speak the missing line during the pause and check your answer.
සංවාදයට සවන් දෙන්න, විරාමයක් පවතින විට අඩුව පවතින වාක්‍යය පවසන්න, ඉන්පසු ඔබේ පිළිතුර පරීක්ෂා කර බලන්න.
ஒலிப்பதிவைக் கவனிக்கவும், இடைவேளையின் போது விடுபட்ட வசனத்தைச் சொல்லவும், பின்னர் உங்கள் பதிலைச் சரிபார்க்கவும்.

activity_a.text:
Match the problems to the proposed solutions. 
 පහත සඳහන් ගැටළු, යෝජිත විසඳුම් සමඟ ගලපන්න. 
 பிரச்சினைகளை அவற்றுக்காக முன்மொழியப்பட்டுள்ள தீர்வுகளுடன் பொருத்துக.

content.colunm_a: The customer is unhappy with the service.
The announcement is difficult to hear.
We arrived before the office opened.
The deadline to submit this report is this evening.
The client has been waiting a long time.

activity_c.text: This email contains several mistakes.
Rewrite it carefully.
The instructions are confusing.
Explain them clearly.
The form has many errors.
Fill it in accurately.
The customer is unhappy with the service.
Respond to him politely.
The announcement is difficult to hear.
Listen attentively.

activity_a.text:
Listen to the audio which will be played twice and click on the correct answer. It is very important that you read the questions before you listen to the recording.
ඔබට සෑම පටිගත කිරීමක්ම දෙවරක් ඇසෙනු ඇත. නිවැරදි පිළිතුර ක්ලික් කරන්න. රෙකෝඩින් එක අහන්නට පෙර ප්‍රශ්නය කියවීම ඉතාමත් වැදගත්ය.
ஒவ்வொரு ஒலிப்பதிவையும் நீங்கள் இருமுறை கேட்கலாம். கேட்ட எண்களை குறித்து எழுதுங்கள். பதிவைக் கேட்பதற்கு முன் கேள்விகளைப் படிப்பது மிகவும் முக்கியம்.

activity_c.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

Questions.question: How does Ravi say he tried to speak during the presentation?
How does the supervisor describe Ravi’s explanation of the main process?
Why does the supervisor suggest changes to some sections?
How does the supervisor advise Ravi to improve the middle section?
Questions.answer: Speak more slowly and pause briefly.
options: Speak more slowly and pause briefly.

Questions.question: How does Ravi plan to prepare for his next presentation?
Questions.answer: He will practise more carefully and prepare more thoroughly.
options: He will practise more carefully and prepare more thoroughly.

activity_b.text: I wanted to talk briefly about your presentation this morning and hear your thoughts on it.
I’d really appreciate some feedback so I can improve my future presentations.
You explained the main process very clearly and answered questions confidently.
You also moved smoothly between points, which helped the audience follow you easily without getting lost.
I was worried I might be speaking too quickly, so I tried to slow down deliberately.
Did that work, or did it still feel rushed in some places?
Some ideas were presented briefly when they needed more detail.
If you explain those parts more carefully, your message will come across more effectively.
Could you please tell me which slides were handled poorly?
The procedures were described quickly and a little unevenly and sloppily.
If you speak more slowly, pause briefly, and structure the points more logically, the audience will understand everything better.
I’ll practise more carefully, adjust the slides methodically, and prepare more thoroughly before my next presentation.

instrction_a.text:
Watch this video to help you better understand today’s lesson.
අද පාඩම හොඳින් අවබෝධ කර ගැනීමට මෙම වීඩියෝව බලන්න.
இன்றைய பாடத்தை நன்றாக புரிந்துகொள்ள இந்த வீடியோவைப் பாருங்கள்.

instruction_b.text:
These steps will help you to learn English from this video.
මෙම වීඩියෝවෙන් ඉංග්‍රීසි ඉගෙන ගැනීමට මෙම පියවර ඔබට උපකාරී වනු ඇත.
இந்த வீடியோவிலிருந்து ஆங்கிலம் கற்க இந்த படிகள் உங்களுக்கு உதவும்.
steps:
Watch the video 2 times.
මේ වීඩියෝ එක දෙවරක් බලන්න.
வீடியோவை இரண்டு முறைப் பாருங்கள்.

Learn new words using Google Translate.
Google පරිවර්තකය භාවිතයෙන් නව වචන ඉගෙන ගන්න.
கூகுள் ட்ரான்ஸ்லேட் பயன்படுத்தி புதிய சொற்களைக் கற்றுக்கொள்ளுங்கள்.
